renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params.oracle: Address of the PPS oracle to set as active

params.key: The key to associate with the address

This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

BANK_MANAGER_ROLE().notice: The identifier of the role that grants access to bank management functions

ECDSAPPSORACLE().notice: Gets the ECDSA PPS Oracle ID

GOVERNOR_ROLE().notice: The identifier of the role that grants access to daily operations like hooks and validators

GUARDIAN_ROLE().notice: The identifier of the role that grants access to guardian functions

SUPER_ASSET_FACTORY().notice: The identifier of the role that grants access to superasset factory

SUPER_GOVERNOR_ROLE().notice: The identifier of the role that grants access to critical governance functions

addExecutor(address).notice: Adds an executor to the approved list

addICCToWhitelist(address).notice: Adds an ICC to the whitelist

addRelayer(address).notice: Adds a relayer to the approved list

addSuperformManager(address).notice: Adds a manager to the superform managers list

addValidator(address).notice: Adds a validator to the approved list

addVaultBank(uint64,address).notice: Adds a vault bank address for a specific chain ID

batchSetEmergencyPrices(address[],uint25.notice: Sets the emergency price for multiple tokens o

batchSetOracleUptimeFeed(address[],addre.notice: Sets uptime feeds for multiple data oracles in batch (Layer 2 only)

changeHooksRootUpdateTimelock(uint256).notice: Changes the hooks root update timelock duration

changePrimaryManager(address,address).notice: Change the primary manager for a strategy

executeActivePPSOracleChange().notice: Executes a previously proposed PPS oracle change after timelock has expired

executeAddIncentiveTokens().notice: Executes a previously proposed whitelisted incentive token update after timelock has expired

executeFeeUpdate(uint8).notice: Executes a previously proposed fee update after timelock has expired

executeMinStalenesChange().notice: Executes a previously proposed minimum staleness change after timelock has expired

executeRemoveIncentiveTokens().notice: Executes a previously proposed whitelisted incentive tokens removal after timelock has expired

executeSuperBankHookMerkleRootUpdate(add.notice: Executes a previously proposed Merkle root update for a specific hook if the effective time has passed.

executeUpkeepCostPerUpdateChange().notice: Executes a previously proposed upkeep cost change after timelock has expired

executeUpkeepPaymentsChange().notice: Executes a previously proposed change to upkeep payments status after timelock expires

executeVaultBankHookMerkleRootUpdate(add.notice: Executes a previously proposed Merkle root update for a specific hook if the effective time has passed.

freezeManagerTakeover().notice: Permanently freezes all manager takeovers globally

getAddress(bytes32).notice: Gets an address from the registry

getAllSuperformManagers().notice: Gets the list of all superform managers

getFee(uint8).notice: Gets the current fee value for a specific fee type

getManagersPaginated(uint256,uint256).notice: Returns up to `limit` superform managers starting from `cursor`

getMinStaleness().notice: Gets the current minimum staleness value

getPPSOracleQuorum().notice: Gets the current quorum requirement for the active PPS Oracle

getProposedActivePPSOracle().notice: Gets the proposed active PPS oracle and its effective time

getProposedMinStaleness().notice: Gets the proposed minimum staleness value and its effective time

getProposedSuperBankHookMerkleRoot(addre.notice: Gets the proposed Merkle root and its effective time for a specific hook.

getProposedUpkeepCostPerUpdate().notice: Gets the proposed upkeep cost per update and its effective time

getProposedUpkeepPaymentsStatus().notice: Gets the proposed upkeep payments status and effective time

getProposedVaultBankHookMerkleRoot(addre.notice: Gets the proposed Merkle root and its effective time for a specific hook.

getProtectedKeepersCount().notice: Gets the number of registered protected keepers

getRegisteredFulfillRequestsHooks().notice: Gets all registered fulfill requests hooks

getSuperBankHookMerkleRoot(address).notice: Returns the current Merkle root for a specific hook's allowed targets.

getSuperformManagersCount().notice: Gets the number of superform managers

getUpkeepCostPerUpdate().notice: Gets the current upkeep cost per update for PPS updates

getVaultBank(uint64).notice: Gets the vault bank address for a specific chain ID

isExecutor(address).notice: Checks if an address is an approved executor

isFulfillRequestsHookRegistered(address).notice: Checks if a hook is registered as a fulfill requests hook

isGuardian(address).notice: Checks if an address has the guardian role

isHookRegistered(address).notice: Checks if a hook is registered

isManagerTakeoverFrozen().notice: Checks if manager takeovers are frozen

isSuperformManager(address).notice: Checks if an address is a registered superform manager

isUpkeepPaymentsEnabled().notice: Checks if upkeep payments are currently enabled

isWhitelistedIncentiveToken(address).notice: Checks if a token is whitelisted as an incentive token

proposeGlobalHooksRoot(bytes32).notice: Proposes a new global hooks Merkle root

proposeUpkeepPaymentsChange(bool).notice: Proposes a change to the upkeep payments enabled status

proposeVaultBankHookMerkleRoot(address,b.notice: Proposes a new Merkle root for a specific hook's allowed targets.

registerProtectedKeeper(address).notice: Registers a keeper that cannot be added as authorized caller by managers

removeSuperformManager(address).notice: Removes a manager from the superform managers list
